creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Xin LI from comment #0)

Thank you for the report.

Seems like this is a side-effect of a dependency update (likely py311-django-soft-delete to 1.0.14), that's why I didn't see the problem when updating the port to 2.11. I'm currently working on a bigger update (which involves django 5), but I will commit one of the solutions you proposed in the meantime (soon).
